tu(t){const[n,r]=(0,e.useState)(0),a=t.transitionDuration||400,o=t.delay||50,i=t.wrapperTag||"div",l=t.childTag||"div",s="undefined"===typeof t.visible||t.visible;return(0,e.useEffect)((()=>{let
